note: MIXED long+medium+short CONTINUOUS. KNOWN PARTIAL (3/4): auto gets 98:1(long,stream) 98:3(short,sliding) 98:4(long,stream) but MISSES 98:2 (medium 42ph) - too long for the 4s sliding window AND the stream buffer stays locked on the long 98:1 whose decode lags, so it refocuses late (past 98:2). This is the growing-buffer-decode limit that streaming-Emformer export would fix (export/streaming-export-plan.md). Workaround today: brief pause between ayat (silence-reset detects each cleanly).
